title: Leg Swelling - Deep Vein Thrombosis
chief_complaint: Left calf pain and swelling for 2 days. Recently returned from a 10-hour flight. On oral contraceptive pills. No chest pain or dyspnea.

physical_exam.legs: Left calf swelling (3cm larger than right), tenderness, warmth, Homan sign positive

hidden_data.doppler_us: Non-compressible thrombus in left popliteal and peroneal veins

key_learning_points: D-Dimer if low probability, US if high

patient_responses.travel: I just flew back from Europe, 10 hours
patient_responses.ocp: I've been on birth control pills for years
patient_responses.pain: My calf is tender and feels tight

feedback.correct_message: Well diagnosed! DVT in the setting of OCP + prolonged travel.
feedback.incorrect_message: This is DVT. The risk factors + positive Doppler confirm it.
feedback.attending_note: DVT management: Start DOAC (rivaroxaban 15mg BID x3 weeks then 20mg daily or apixaban 10mg BID x7 days then 5mg BID). Treat for 3-6 months. Compression stockings for symptoms. No bed rest - early mobilization.
